description: You are a vineyard manager in Burgundy, France, preparing a biodynamic planting schedule for root crops. From Beaune, France (47.02° N, 4.84° E), identify the specific dates in May 2024 at 22:00 UTC when the Moon is located within the IAU boundaries of the constellation Virgo. Capture a screenshot of the Moon while it is within the Virgo boundary to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and create a text file at ~/Desktop/planting_schedule.txt documenting the location (Beaune, France), the target constellation (Virgo), and the identified dates.
